summary: Test suite validates main requirements (parsing, aggregation, flaky detection, workflow structure) through a single end-to-end act integration test with one fixture scenario. However, it lacks breadth: only one test case when requirements implied multiple cases; no error condition testing (missing InputPath, no files, malformed input) despite code having error handlers; no edge cases or boundary conditions tested. Individual parser functions are only tested indirectly through the act integration test. No unit-level testing of Format-MarkdownSummary output format. The suite would catch major regressions in the happy path but would miss error handling and edge case failures.
